name_en: M24443 Violet - This Speedy Bandoulière 25 Monogram Leather handbag features soft calfskin, recreating the refined look of the canvas print with the Monogram pattern. Shiny metal hardware, lambskin lining, and a plaque together attest to Creative Director Pharrell Williams' relentless pursuit of details. 25 x 15 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)
